lane.title: 03 Delivery Aggregator
lane.last_task: Initialize Delivery Aggregator lane and verify platform/margin gate
lane.last_summary: Read lane memory, unified graph, prior aggregator trail, live authenticated aggregator APIs, and MS25-MS35 proof artifacts. Live health now reports delivery status down because Swiggy snapshots are silent ~962min; Zomato HE order capture is current through 2026-05-24 with 93 month orders, 83 delivered, Rs24542 delivered revenue, 72% discount usage in order-detail sample, and 6.5% cancellation. Swiggy HE remains sparse/stale: last per-order capture 2026-04-17 and parsed month shows 0 current orders. Margin/proof gate remains unchanged: only Zomato 8 price-only rows are team-safe; no offers, no combo/value edits, no Swiggy packet, and C003/Ghee Rice + Butter Chicken remains blocked by full combo recipe/packaging/visual proof.
lane.next_action: Either audit whether the 8 Zomato price-only rows were manually executed with before/after proof, or build a Swiggy readiness repair packet; do not launch offers or combo edits until platform proof, active offer-stack proof, and food+packaging margin proof close.
lane.mutation_status: Read-only verification and memory writeback only. No Zomato/Swiggy portal, Odoo/POS, ad, WABA, pricing, or repo UI mutation.
